text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Nice running, me! I must have<n>captivated over
ten-thousand people<n>with today's performance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I can already see it! The swarm of<n>reporters
descending upon me like a<n>meteor shower,
lauding me as best<n>newcomer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, dear reporters, the day is here!<n>Interview me
to your heart's content!
Silence...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What? An empty house? No!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Um... Opera O? Do you have a moment<n>for some
questions?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Only one person?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'm here, too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You looked amazing out there, Opera<n>O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And Doto?! It... it wasn't supposed to<n>be like this...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! What on earth is happening<n>here?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not that famous... So, not even the top<n>reporters of
the age have taken<n>notice of my existence?

Hardly any Umamusume become a<n>hot topic right
after their debut.

For the first time, Opera O faces the<n>wall known as
reality...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! That is fine! It onlyproves I have taken a step forward.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A grand total of zero reporters had<n>ever come to
interview me before<n>today.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But now, zero has become one!That is far more difficult than turningone into ten.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, the curtain has, without a doubt,<n>been raised
for the legend of the<n>Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just a small twinkle of my brilliance<n>has been
seen, but I am fully<n>satisfied. Haaah ha ha ha!

She just can't see it. So much for the<n>wall of
reality.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With this spectacular debut under my<n>belt, why
don't we move on toward<n>my next
accomplishment?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, Trainer! What is my next<n>objective?
choice_data_list: Um, the next race goal is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, no. Forget about races for a<n>moment. I want to
focus on increasing<n>the number of reporters I
attract.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must rescue the poor masses stuck<n>in the abyss
of despair that is not<n>knowing my existence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Have you any words of wisdom?<n>How can we go
about attracting more<n>reporters?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Fans?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes... More fans will result in<n>more reporters,
just as more<n>reporters will result in more fans...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What came first, the chicken or the<n>egg? Or was it
me?! I came first, then<n>the egg! It all lines up!

I don't follow, but she seems to<n>accept my
suggestion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is settled. Our first order of business<n>is to
increase my fandom. And to<n>increase fans, one
must...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Race! Join this race and then that<n>race—every race
available, even if it<n>means merely one more fan!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto! Let us be off! Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: C-coming!

Turning on her heel, T.M. Opera O<n>starts walking
to... who knows where.

I guess she's just riding her<n>excitement.
Certainly she'll be<n>waiting for me right outside the
venue.
